tasks.title: Implement Session Execute Endpoint Handler
tasks.description: Create POST /api/sessions/{id}/execute endpoint handler with full agent execution and tool access. Create execute.rs with execute_session handler, integrate AgentExecutor for agent lifecycle, integrate ToolRegistry for tool discovery, implement SSE streaming for ExecuteEvent types (tool_call, tool_result, message, complete, error), register route, and add authentication middleware.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify execute_session handler returns 200 for valid session ID
AddUnitTest: verify ToolRegistry tools are discovered and executed via execute endpoint
AddUnitTest: verify tool execution results appear in response body
AddIntegrationTest: verify invalid session ID returns 404 via execute endpoint
AddIntegrationTest: verify unauthenticated request returns 401 via execute endpoint
AddUnitTest: verify SSE streaming works with Accept: text/event-stream header
AddErrorHandlingTest: test execute endpoint with malformed request body returns 400
tasks.impl_notes: Integrate AgentExecutor from crates/agent/src/lib.rs and ToolRegistry from crates/tools/src/lib.rs. Route registration: cfg.route("/{id}/execute", web::post().to(execute_session)). Use existing types from crates/server/src/routes/execute/types.rs.

tasks.title: Refactor Run Endpoint to Use AgentExecutor
tasks.description: Refactor run_prompt in run.rs to integrate with AgentExecutor and ToolRegistry for full tool-aware execution. Enable streaming response with SSE for progressive token output and propagate tool errors properly to response.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify POST /api/run executes tools via AgentExecutor
AddUnitTest: verify tool results appear in response body via run endpoint
AddIntegrationTest: verify streaming works for LLM tokens via SSE
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify tool errors are properly propagated in response
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing /api/run behavior is preserved after refactor
tasks.impl_notes: Refactor run_prompt to use AgentExecutor instead of basic LLM chat. Integrate ToolRegistry for tool discovery and execution.

tasks.title: Implement Server Status Endpoint
tasks.description: Add GET /api/status endpoint for server health and status information. Create status.rs with status handler, implement response with version, status, uptime_seconds, session stats, provider status array, and plugin list. No authentication required.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify GET /api/status returns 200 with correct JSON structure
AddUnitTest: verify response contains version, status, uptime_seconds fields
AddUnitTest: verify response contains active_sessions and total_sessions counts
AddUnitTest: verify providers array contains name, status, model fields
AddUnitTest: verify plugins array contains name, version, status fields
AddIntegrationTest: verify endpoint does not require authentication
AddRegressionTest: ensure response time is under 100ms
tasks.impl_notes: Create crates/server/src/routes/status.rs. Route: GET /api/status. Response time requirement: < 100ms.

tasks.title: Integrate WebSocket with Agent Runtime
tasks.description: Connect WebSocket endpoints to agent runtime for real-time streaming of agent execution output. Create event emitter in agent runtime, broadcast AgentEvent to connected WebSocket clients, support multiple concurrent connections per session, handle client disconnection gracefully.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify WebSocket receives tool_call events in real-time
AddUnitTest: verify WebSocket receives token-by-token LLM output
AddIntegrationTest: verify multiple clients can connect to same session
AddIntegrationTest: verify client disconnection does not crash server
AddErrorHandlingTest: test WebSocket handles malformed AgentEvent gracefully
tasks.impl_notes: Modify crates/server/src/routes/ws.rs and crates/server/src/routes/acpws.rs. AgentEvent types: ToolCall, ToolResult, Token, Message, Error, Complete.

tasks.title: Connect Permission Reply to Permission System
tasks.description: Connect permission_reply handler to actual permission system to process user approval/denial decisions. Connect to PermissionManager, update ApprovalQueue with user decisions, trigger re-evaluation of pending requests after approval, log decisions to audit trail.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify user approval triggers tool execution
AddUnitTest: verify user denial returns PermissionDenied error
AddIntegrationTest: verify approval queue is updated with user decision
AddRegressionTest: ensure pending requests are re-evaluated after approval
AddErrorHandlingTest: test permission_reply with invalid request returns error
tasks.impl_notes: Modify crates/server/src/routes/permission.rs. Handler exists but not connected to PermissionManager.

tasks.title: Implement SSE Streaming Response
tasks.description: Implement chunked/streaming response for run and execute endpoints. Detect Accept: text/event-stream header, stream LLM tokens as they arrive using SSE format, include proper SSE formatting (data: {...}\n\n), handle connection interruption gracefully.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: curl -H 'Accept: text/event-stream' -d '{"prompt":"hi"}' /api/run streams tokens
AddUnitTest: verify each token arrives as separate SSE event with data: prefix
AddIntegrationTest: verify connection close terminates streaming cleanly
AddRegressionTest: ensure non-SSE Accept header returns normal JSON response
AddErrorHandlingTest: test SSE streaming with interrupted connection handles gracefully
tasks.impl_notes: Modify crates/server/src/routes/run.rs and crates/server/src/routes/execute.rs. SSE format: data: {...}\n\n

tasks.title: Complete SDK Documentation
tasks.description: Complete SDK documentation for publishing to crates.io. Add cargo doc comments to all public items, create working examples for all public APIs, prepare README with installation instructions.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: cargo doc generates complete documentation without warnings
AddUnitTest: verify all public items have doc comments via doc coverage check
AddIntegrationTest: verify all examples in docs compile and run
tasks.impl_notes: Modify crates/sdk/src/**/*.rs. Publish to crates.io requires complete documentation.

tasks.title: Document LSP Integration
tasks.description: Document IDE extension support for LSP integration. Document VSCode LSP client setup, document Neovim LSP setup, list supported LSP features.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify VSCode LSP setup documentation exists and is complete
AddRegressionTest: verify Neovim LSP setup documentation exists and is complete
AddUnitTest: verify list of supported LSP features is documented
tasks.impl_notes: Create documentation in crates/lsp/. Document VSCode and Neovim setup, list supported LSP features.
